eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 11:44 AM ON MAY 16, 2026 Effective until 07:44 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Tucson Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Tucson Police Department is looking for Armando Mesa Rivas. Last seen on foot near 6600 block of east Golf Links Road in Tucson Arizona If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
